description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, aerodynamic body painted in a muted teal color with bold black racing stripes running from the hood to the trunk. The car has a muscular stance, with wide, low-profile black wheels and a pronounced hood bulge, suggesting a high-performance engine beneath. The front end is aggressive, with narrow headlights and a wide grille, while the rear showcases modern, horizontal taillights and a subtle rear spoiler. The side profile reveals two doors, flush door handles, and tinted windows, emphasizing its sporty, two-door coupe design. The roofline is smooth and continuous, flowing seamlessly into the rear deck. Chrome accents are minimal, focusing attention on the car's bold lines and performance-oriented details.
description: A sporty teal coupe car with black racing stripes, wide black wheels, and an aggressive, aerodynamic design. Features two doors, tinted windows, and a modern, performance-focused appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the coupe's two-door layout, black wheels, and the full length of the black racing stripes.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the horizontal taillights, rear spoiler, and the continuation of the black stripes over the trunk.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the two-door design and black wheels, with clear visibility of the fuel cap and side mirrors.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the aggressive grille, narrow headlights, and the prominent hood bulge with black striping.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
